name: flagger
description: Chrome extension to flag elements on a webpage and copy a Markdown brief for an AI coding agent.

scripts.test: node test/sessions.test.js && node test/passthrough.test.js && node test/follow-background.test.js && node test/follow.test.js && node test/navigate.test.js && node test/comments.test.js && node test/close.test.js && node test/detect.test.js
